title: Purgosea conspicua
taxonomy: Purgosea conspicua belongs to the family of moths, specifically the subfamily of noctuid moths, and within that, the genus Purgosea. Purgosea conspicua is classified as a species within the order Lepidoptera. The classification of Purgosea conspicua is further detailed into the kingdom Animalia, phylum Arthropoda, and class Insecta. This species is also classified as a type of moth under the rank of species. As of my knowledge cutoff, the classification of Purgosea conspicua is as mentioned, but please note that taxonomy is subject to change.
uses: Purgosea conspicua is a species of moth, and therefore, it does not have any known medicinal uses.
